join.title: Join a group
join.hint: Enter the 6-character code your director gave you.

login.errEmailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
login.errRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
login.noProfile: Your account isn't ready yet. Reload the page; if it persists, contact support.

goodbye.title: Account deleted
goodbye.body: Your account and data have been removed. Thanks for using Ensayadero.

signup.title: Create account
signup.checkEmailBody: We've sent an activation link to {{email}}. Open it to activate your account.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.hint: We'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a link to reset the password.

home.joinByCodeHint: Use the code or link your group's director shared with you.
home.newGroupExplain: Create a new group: you'll be its director and can invite the others.
home.newGroupHint: You'll be the director of this group and can invite the others.
home.noGroups: You don't belong to any group yet. Join with a code or create your own.

availability.title: My availability
availability.copyHint: Copies this week's availability to the next weeks (replacing whatever was there).
availability.clearScheduledConfirm: This slot has a scheduled rehearsal. Remove your availability anyway?
availability.clearScheduledBody: You're about to remove your availability on slots with a scheduled rehearsal. Removing all of a rehearsal's availability marks you as "Not going". What do you want to remove?
availability.clearFull: Remove the whole rehearsal (marks me "Not going")
availability.clearWeekConfirm: All the availability you marked this week will be removed. This can't be undone.
availability.clearAffects: Removes your availability and marks you "Not going" for these scheduled rehearsals:

group.promoteConfirm: Make {{name}} a director? They'll be able to schedule rehearsals, invite and manage the group.
group.demoteConfirm: Move {{name}} to actor? They'll no longer be able to manage the group.
group.leaveConfirm: Leave this group? You'll be removed from its rehearsals. This action cannot be undone.
group.leaveSuccessor: You are the only director: choose who will direct the group

invite.title: Invite to the group
invite.qrHint: Scan the QR or enter the code.
invite.emailsLabel: Emails (separated by comma, space or newline)
invite.disabledNote: The code is disabled. No one can join with it.
invite.disableConfirm: If you turn the code off, no one can join with it until you turn it back on. Turn off?
invite.enableConfirm: This re-enables the code and anyone with it can join again. Turn on?
invite.regenerateConfirm: A new code will be generated. Previously shared links and QR codes will stop working and you'll need to share them again. Email invitations and current members are unaffected. Regenerate?

sessions.cancelConfirm: Cancel this rehearsal? All participants will be notified.
sessions.shortLinkNotFound: This rehearsal link does not exist or you are not a member of the group.

planner.title: Plan rehearsal
planner.membersOnly: You must be a group member to plan.
planner.legend: The number shows how many selected people are available. Deep green = everyone. Tap a slot to see details and create the rehearsal.
planner.legendDrag: The number shows how many selected people are available. Drag to select several consecutive slots and create the rehearsal with that duration.
planner.cancelConfirm: Cancel this rehearsal? All convened people will be notified.
planner.requiredOutsideConfirm: Warning: {{names}} (required) have NO availability in this slot. Create anyway?

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.genderHint: Only used to show your role as actress/actor or director in the app.
profile.pushDescription: Get alerts for confirmed rehearsals, changes and cancellations on this device.
profile.pushError: Could not enable. Check browser permissions or install the app (iOS requires installing it).
profile.deleteDescription: Deletes your account and all your data: availability, groups, rehearsal responses and notifications. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteConfirm: This action is irreversible. Type {{keyword}} to confirm:

admin.title: Administration
admin.archiveConfirm: Archive "{{name}}"? It will no longer be visible to its members.
admin.directorEmailHint: If they don't have an account, an invitation with the Director role will be sent.

legalShared.captchaPrompt: Verify you're human to see the contact details.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how Ensayadero processes your personal data under Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spain's Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD).

data.title: 2. Data we process
data.body:
• Account data: name, email and, where applicable, photo and the sign-in provider identifier (Google/Meta).
• Usage data: the groups you belong to, your time availability, rehearsals and your attendance.
• Technical data: access and security logs needed to run the service.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose
purpose.body: We process your data to create and manage your account, enable rehearsal organisation and the coordination of availability and attendance within your groups, and send you service-related notifications.

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal basis
legalBasis.body:
• Performance of the service contract you accept on sign-up (Art. 6.1.b GDPR).
• Your consent for sign-in via external providers and for notifications (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), which you can withdraw at any time.
• Legitimate interest in keeping the platform secure (Art. 6.1.f GDPR).

retention.title: 5. Retention
retention.body: We keep your data while your account is active. If you delete your account or leave the platform, your data is erased or anonymised, unless we are legally required to keep it.

recipients.title: 6. Recipients and processors
recipients.body:
We do not sell your data. To run the service we use providers acting as processors:
• Supabase (database, authentication and functions).
• Cloudflare (frontend hosting and protection).
• Resend (email delivery).
• Google and Meta (sign-in, only if you use that option).

transfers.title: 7. International transfers
transfers.body: Some providers may process data outside the European Economic Area. Where that happens, transfers rely on adequacy decisions or the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses.

rights.title: 8. Your rights
rights.body: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to {{privacyEmail}}. You can also withdraw consent at any time and lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

security.title: 9. Security
security.body: We apply technical and organisational measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit, row-level access control (RLS) and secure authentication.

storage.title: 10. Local storage
storage.body: The app uses browser local storage to keep your session and preferences. We do not use advertising tracking cookies.

changes.title: 11. Changes
changes.body: We may update this policy. Any change will be published on this page with its update date.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.intro: Legal notice and terms of use for Ensayadero, under Spain's Law 34/2002 (LSSI-CE).

terms.title: 2. Terms of use
terms.body: Accessing Ensayadero implies acceptance of this legal notice. The app lets theatre groups organise rehearsals and coordinate availability and attendance. You agree to use the service lawfully and not to harm its operation or other users' rights.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
ip.body: The software, brand, design and contents of Ensayadero belong to its owner or licensors. Reproduction or exploitation without authorisation is not allowed.

liability.title: 4. Liability
liability.body: The service is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, the owner does not guarantee uninterrupted availability and is not liable for damages arising from use of the service or the unavailability of external providers.

links.title: 5. Links
links.body: The app may contain links to third-party sites (e.g. sign-in providers). The owner is not responsible for their content or policies.

law.title: 6. Governing law and jurisdiction
law.body: This notice is governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts of the owner's domicile, unless mandatory rules provide otherwise.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: Information about the use of cookies and local storage in Ensayadero.

what.title: 1. What they are
what.body: Cookies and similar technologies (such as browser local storage) are small files a site stores on your device so it can work properly.

types.title: 2. What we use
types.body:
Ensayadero only uses strictly necessary technical storage:
• Session and authentication, to keep you signed in.
• App preferences.
We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies, so no consent banner is required.

used.title: 3. Third parties
used.body: The providers that run the service (Supabase for authentication and Cloudflare for security) may use technical storage necessary for the platform's operation and security.

manage.title: 4. Managing storage
manage.body: You can delete or block storage from your browser settings. As it is technical and necessary, blocking it may prevent sign-in and use of the app.

changes.title: 5. Changes
changes.body: We may update this cookie policy; changes will be published on this page.
